posts.text: Eid Mubarak to all who celebrate in our community and around the world. Wishing everyone peace and fulfillment as Ramadan ends!

Gas prices are on the rise due to Trump's reckless actions in Iran.

The American people shouldn't have to pay for an illegal war they don't want.

Why are the Saudis investing BILLIONS into Jared Kushner's firm while he's putting together Middle East policy for Trump?

This is the most corrupt Administration in history.

Video

Cory Lewandowski may have set up a pay-to-play scheme inside the Department of Homeland Security. We are going to investigate and end this corruption.

Video

Pam Bondi's fake briefing on Epstein was shameful. She's clearly trying to get out of her real hearing that will be transcribed and UNDER OATH.

We won't participate in these games, and we look forward to her deposition—which is required by our bipartisan subpoena and the law.

Video
I stand in solidarity and give my unwavering support to Dolores Huerta and the other courageous women who came forward with their stories of abuse by César Chávez.

Both Democrats and Republicans agreed to subpoena Pam Bondi — under oath, transcribed, and shared with the public.

Today’s “briefing” was not that. No more games. She still has to come before our committee.

Video

.@OversightDems and I just walked out of a fake briefing where AG Pam Bondi refused to say she would follow our subpoena and testify to our Committee under oath. 

She must follow the law. And we won’t participate in these games. It’s time for Bondi to testify under oath.

Video

Oversight Democrats just walked out of an outrageous fake hearing where Pam Bondi refused to say she would show up for her under oath deposition.

We asked her multiple times and she refused to commit. We won’t participate in a fake hearing that’s not under oath and not transcribed. The American people deserve transparency and the truth. We are going to end this White House Cover-Up.

Trump's illegal war of choice is raising the price of gas.

The American people deserve better.

Video

President Trump continues his assault on California and our coastlines by ordering the restart of offshore drilling.

His reckless policies pose serious consequences for the environment and public health, and our state isn't backing down without a fight.


The Hill (@thehill)

The Trump administration orders restart of California offshore oil operations
thehill.com/policy/energy-en…




— https://nitter.net/thehill/status/2032849238233657545#m
We just filed for re-election to Congress!
Abolish ICE. #congressman #democrats #dems #abolishice
It’s a White House Cover-Up. #democrats #congressman #dems #oversightcommittee #releasethefiles
ICE is terrorizing LA. All people have a right to due process. #democrats #congressman #dems
NO MORE OIL DRILLING off our coast. #democrats #congressman #dems
We won’t stop until we RELEASE the Epstein files! #democrats #congressman
Time to stop this Epstein cover-up.
Release the Epstein Files, NOW. #democrats #congressman #dems
Let’s fucking go.
Let’s stop Trump and Vote!
